ideation: This animation sequence depicts a dragon's breath and tail movements.  The arms will mimic the breathing motion, while the wrist movements suggest a tail flick.  Frame 1 starts with both arms slightly raised and extended outward, palms down, ready to 'exhale'.  Frame 2 shows both arms moving forward and downward, simulating the exhaled breath.  The wrists will flick outward slightly in this frame.  Frame 3 reverses this, the arms rise again, as if the dragon is inhaling. The wrists return to a neutral position. Frame 4 is a variation of Frame 1, with the arms slightly higher, suggesting a more powerful inhalation.  The final frame returns to the initial pose.

frames.beat: arms extend outward, ready to breathe fire
arms thrust forward and down, exhaling with a wrist flick
arms rise higher, a mighty breath drawn in
arms return to a resting, powerful stance
